name: Monkfish Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the wok until very hot.
2. Add 2 tablespoons peanut oil and coat the sides.
3. Let the oil heat for a few seconds.
4. Add celery and cook about 3 minutes, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon.
5. When just tender, transfer celery to a platter.
6. Add zucchini to the wok and stir fry for 2 to 3 minutes until tender. Transfer zucchini to the platter with celery.
7. Add red pepper to the wok. Cook about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Transfer vegetables to the platter.
9. Dredge fish in flour.
10. Add 1 tablespoon more peanut oil to the hot wok.
11. Stir fry fish in 2 to 3 batches, ensuring that the cubes of fish do not touch each other in the wok.
12. When cooked, transfer fish to a platter.
13. After the fish is removed from the wok, add soy sauce and sherry to the wok and mix.
14. Return fish to the wok and toss briefly to coat with the soy mixture.
15. Add remaining vegetables to the wok and toss briefly to coat with the soy mixture and heat briefly.
16. Serve immediately.
